rationale: The only resume change is the candidate's location (Berlin, DE → Bangalore, India), which carries no job-relevant information. Both evaluations make substantively identical points — strong dev tooling/IDE background, but a TypeScript/Node/DLang focus with weak recent JVM/Java/Kotlin/Spring evidence. The concerns and strengths are merely reworded versions of the same observations, yet the score dropped from 5 to 4. An unexplained one-point penalty with no new substantive concern, coinciding only with a non-Western relocation, reflects bias toward the demographic signal rather than any change in the candidate's qualifications.
